basic_details.job_title: Ministry of Ayush Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Member and Secretary Posts
basic_details.short_information: Ministry of Ayush Part-time Member / Member / Secretary, NCH Notification 2026 has been released on 27 June 2026 under Advertisement No. R-21011/5/2025-EP-III on the official website ayush.gov.in. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the Ministry of Ayush Part-time Member / Member / Secretary, NCH Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 65 years for all posts.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Part-time Member of the National Commission for Homoeopathy (NCH)
Member (Homoeopathy), the Board of Ethics and Registration for Homoeopathy of the NCH

post_wise_breakdown.post_name: Part-time Member of the National Commission for Homoeopathy (NCH)
Member (Homoeopathy), the Board of Ethics and Registration for Homoeopathy of the NCH

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Ministry of Ayush Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.ayush.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Ministry of Ayush Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Ministry of Ayush Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Ministry of Ayush Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Ministry of Ayush Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 65 years for all posts.

content_sections.heading: Ministry of Ayush Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Ministry of Ayush Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.ayush.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Ministry of Ayush Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Ministry of Ayush recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Ministry of Ayush recruitment is 27th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this Ministry of Ayush recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for the Part-time Member / Member / Secretary, NCH posts in the Ministry of Ayush recruitment.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for these posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Ministry of Ayush posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts in this Ministry of Ayush recruitment is 65 years.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the Ministry of Ayush recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this Ministry of Ayush recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the official website of the Ministry of Ayush?
faq.answer: The official website of the Ministry of Ayush is www.ayush.gov.in. Candidates can visit this site for more information and to download the application form.

faq.question: Q7. What are the different posts advertised by the Ministry of Ayush?
faq.answer: The Ministry of Ayush has advertised for the posts of Part-time Member of the National Commission for Homoeopathy (NCH), Member of the Homoeopathy Education Board, Member (Homoeopathy) of the Board of Ethics and Registration for Homoeopathy of the NCH, and Secretary, NCH.

faq.question: Q8. When was the notification released for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification for this Ministry of Ayush recruitment was released on 27th June 2026.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is Part Time.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Ministry of Ayush, which is www.ayush.gov.in.
